acceptance_criteria.text: outreach.send_batch is registered as a real Agent Blueprint capability through ActionOrchestrator.
proof: Import smoke confirmed orchestrator handler registration.

acceptance_criteria.text: The capability queues only approved drafts for the run business, respects the hard daily cap, and does not directly dispatch external messages.
proof: src/services/outreach_send_capability.py filters by approved draft status, l.business_id, unqueued drafts, and daily cap.
The handler creates approved queue batches and reports external_dispatch_performed=false.
tests/test_agent_blueprint_layer.py covers the no-direct-dispatch queue behavior.
scripts/smoke_agent_blueprint_outreach_api.py passed against live app container with a real session token.

acceptance_criteria.text: Starting a run cannot use a blueprint_version_id from a different blueprint.
proof: src/api/agent_blueprints_api.py validates version ownership and returns VERSION_BLUEPRINT_MISMATCH.
tests/test_agent_blueprint_layer.py includes a regression marker test.

acceptance_criteria.text: Backend guardrails cover imports, route ownership, PostgreSQL placeholder checks, and Agent Blueprint capability safety.
proof: scripts/lint_backend_baseline.sh checks Agent Blueprint runtime markers.

commands_for_fresh_verifier: python3 -m py_compile src/api/agent_blueprints_api.py src/services/agent_blueprint_orchestrator.py src/services/agent_blueprint_runner.py src/services/outreach_send_capability.py tests/test_agent_blueprint_layer.py

PYTHONPATH=src python3 - <<'PY'
from services.agent_blueprint_orchestrator import build_agent_blueprint_orchestrator
from services.outreach_send_capability import OUTREACH_SEND_BATCH_CAPABILITY
orch = build_agent_blueprint_orchestrator()
if OUTREACH_SEND_BATCH_CAPABILITY not in orch.handlers:
    raise SystemExit('missing outreach handler')
print('OK orchestrator handler registered')
PY
ssh ... 'cd /opt/seo-app && docker compose exec -T app sh -lc "APP_SRC_DIR=/app/src python3 -"' < scripts/smoke_agent_blueprint_outreach_api.py
known_gaps: No known P0/P1 gaps for the Agent Blueprint authenticated supervised outreach smoke.
